## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest server/tests/ -q`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] Tested on a real iPad (or note why this is not applicable)
- [ ] Screenshots included if the UI changed
